creator: g.s@arcor.de
text:
> locale
LANG=C
LC_CTYPE=de_DE.ISO8859-1
LC_COLLATE="C"
LC_TIME="C"
LC_NUMERIC="C"
LC_MONETARY="C"
LC_MESSAGES="C"
LC_ALL=

> sed s/ä/ae/
sed: 1: "s/ä/ae/": RE error: trailing backslash (\)

> echo -n ä | od -x
0000000      00e4                                                        
0000001

Also affects characters like ßçáàîÆ

Does not happen with LC_CTYPE=de_DE.UTF-8
